prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-3LDSARFNB-BL-2-FBA Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Emergency Motion 3 LED Dynamo Squeeze Action Handheld Flashlight - No Batteries Needed Description: The 3 LED super bright dynamo squeeze action handheld flashlight requires no batteries to operate; just squeeze the built in hand crank to power the flashlight and illuminate wherever you point it!

For being so little this guy is powerful. The 3 LEDs encased in the main housing can put out a max 15 lumens of brightness that will shine as long as you need it too. At only 4-inches in length the mini emergency dynamo flashlight is a keepsake that can be stored anywhere you may find yourself in trouble during a power outage or storm including your vehicle trunk or glove box, kitchen junk drawer, garage, outdoor camping and hiking in the wilderness

The emergency use flashlight is a long duration survival flashlight that needs no batteries to operate. The built-in squeeze action trigger winds interior gears give the bulb energy to shine its light wherever you point it.

See the inner workings of how this flashlight produces power and converts it to energy. A optimal learning and enjoyment exercise in mechanical engineering with children in science class.

This flashlight has a built-in squeeze action to power itself anywhere and with its nylon strap is great for emergencies, travel, outdoor activities, and more. Search Terms: storm emergency no battery handcrank superbright flashlight kids learning science disaster kit Features: - NO BATTERIES NEEDED: This small emergency use flashlight is a long duration survival flashlight that needs no batteries to operate; the built-in squeeze action trigger winds the interior gears giving the bulbs energy to shine its light wherever you point it - SPECIFICATIONS: Flashlight is operable by handcrank dynamo squeeze action trigger; Flashlight must be squeezed to power the flashlight; Flashlight contains a small charge for immediate first time use, ideal for rapid deployment and emergency use when stored in a glovebox - ULTRA COMPACT: At only 4-inches in length the mini emergency dynamo flashlight is a keepsake that can be stored anywhere you may find yourself in trouble during a power outage or storm including your vehicle trunk or glove box, kitchen junk drawer, garage, outdoor camping and hiking in the wilderness - 3 SUPER BRIGHT LED: For being so little this guy is powerful; the 3 LEDs encased in the main housing can put out 15 lumens of brightness that will shine as long as you need it too - SEE THROUGH CASE: See the inner workings of how this flashlight produces power and converts it to energy. A optimal learning and enjoyment exercise in mechanical engineering with children in science class === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3 LED Dynamo Squeeze Flashlight No Batteries

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-Inch Emergency Dynamo Handheld Flashlight

anthropic.title_differentiation: Hand Crank Powered, 15 Lumens, 4-Inch Compact, Emergency Survival, See-Through Case, Educational

openai.title_differentiation: No Batteries Needed, 3 Super Bright LEDs, 15 Lumens, Compact 4-Inch Size, See Through Case, Hand Crank Power
